description: Prove that for natural numbers a and i, if i < a, then a - (i + 1) < a - i.
statement: theorem Nat.sub_succ_lt_self (a i : Nat) (h : i < a) : a - (i + 1) < a - i
notes: From fp-lean examples/Examples/ProgramsProofs/Inequalities.lean lines 887-893. Ground-truth proof: rw [Nat.add_succ, Nat.sub_succ]; apply Nat.pred_lt; apply Nat.not_eq_zero_of_lt; apply Nat.zero_lt_sub_of_lt; assumption
